title: metrosideros collina var. pumila
intro: Metrosideros collina var. pumila, commonly known as the dwarf New Zealand rata, is a flowering plant species that is native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Metrosideros collina var. pumila include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and support the immune system. The plant is traditionally used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, which are used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
